tasks.intent:
Set up search filters for private seller boats near Miami with minimum price $35,000.

WHAT TO CLICK:
- Location dropdown (shows 'Location' text with down arrow in left sidebar)
- 'Zip Code' pill button (rounded white button in sidebar)
- Distance dropdown showing '25 miles' (keep default or select 25)
- Price filter dropdown in left sidebar
- Minimum price field or slider
- 'Private Seller' option in seller type filter
- Sort dropdown in top-right showing 'Sort: Recommended'

WHAT TO NEVER CLICK:
- Any boat photos (large rectangular images in listing cards)
- Heart/save icons (heart-shaped icons in top-right of photos)
- 'Featured' labels (gray tags on photos)
- Social media icons (circular white icons in footer: YouTube, Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, Reddit)
- Blue promotional banners ('Calculate your boat loan instantly', 'Pre-qualify for a boat loan')
- Navigation dropdown menus in header

STEPS:
1. Look for zip code input field in left sidebar Location section
2. type_text('33101') in the zip code field
3. Ensure distance is set to 25 miles (click dropdown if needed)
4. Find and click on Price filter dropdown in left sidebar
5. Set minimum price to 35000 (type in field or use slider)
6. Find and click on Seller Type filter in left sidebar
7. Click on 'Private Seller' option (text or checkbox)
8. Click on Sort dropdown in top-right showing 'Sort: Recommended'
9. Click on 'Recently Updated' or 'Newest' option
10. done(success=true, summary='Search filters configured for private sellers near Miami 33101, $35k minimum, sorted by newest')

ERROR HANDLERS:
- If popup appears → look for 'Accept' or 'OK' button, click once
- If page doesn't load → scroll(direction='down', amount=3), wait, try again
- If filter not found → scroll(direction='down', amount=3) in sidebar to reveal more options
- If off-site redirect → key_press(keys='alt+left') immediately

Extract boat listing data from filtered search results.

WHAT TO CLICK:
- Listing TITLE TEXT: the text showing Year Make Model BELOW the boat photo
- Each listing card has: large photo on top, then title text, then price
- Click the TITLE TEXT — it opens the listing detail page

WHAT TO NEVER CLICK:
- Boat PHOTOS (large rectangular images) — opens fullscreen gallery trap ("1 of N")
- Heart/save icons in corners of cards
- Social media icons in footer
- Ad banners, dealer logos, navigation menus

STEPS FOR EACH LISTING:
1. Find the {ORDINAL} listing card in the search results
2. click() on the TITLE TEXT below the photo (the Year Make Model text)
3. On the detail page: scroll(direction="down", amount=5) past photos to description
4. Look for phone numbers: (305)555-1234, 786-555-1234, 305.555.5678
5. IGNORE: prices ($45,000), years (2020), zip codes (33101)
6. Extract: Year, Make, Model, Price, Phone (if found), Seller name
7. key_press(keys="alt+left") to go BACK to search results
8. VERIFY: check that you're back on the search results page with listings visible
9. If filters were lost (shows 125,000+ boats instead of filtered results), scroll to sidebar and re-apply Private Seller filter
10. done() with your findings

OUTPUT FORMAT — YOU MUST FILL IN ALL FIELDS with actual data from the page:
done(success=true, summary='VIABLE | Year: <from title> | Make: <from title> | Model: <from title> | Price: <from page> | Phone: <if visible, else none> | URL: <from address bar>')

If no phone: done(success=true, summary='VIABLE | Year: <from title> | Make: <from title> | Model: <from title> | Price: <from page> | Phone: <if visible, else none> | URL: <from address bar>')

ERROR HANDLERS:
- Photo gallery ("1 of N"): key_press(keys="Escape"), then key_press(keys="alt+left") to go back
- 404 error: key_press(keys="alt+left"), done with SKIPPED
- Off-site (not boattrader.com): key_press(keys="alt+left") immediately
- Cookie popup: click Accept ONCE
- Filters lost after going back: scroll to sidebar, click Private Seller checkbox again

CRITICAL OUTPUT RULES:
- Replace <from title> with ACTUAL values you read from the page
- For example: done(success=true, summary='VIABLE | Year: 2018 | Make: Everglades | Model: 355 CC | Price: $239000 | Phone: none | URL: boattrader.com/boat/2018-everglades-355')
- Do NOT output 'Year: Year' or 'Year: <from title>' — output the actual year like '2018'
- Read the URL from the browser address bar and include it

loop.pagination_intent: Click 'Next' text link at bottom of results page to go to next page of listings
